mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMENTS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO COMMENTS ( COMMENT_ID, PLAYLIST_ID, USER_ID, CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{playlistId}, #{userId}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB} )
mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENT_ID, C.PLAYLIST_ID, C.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, C.CONTENT, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT, C.DELETED_AT FROM COMMENTS C JOIN PLAYLISTS P ON P.PLAYLIST_ID = C.PLAYLIST_ID JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE C.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND C.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT C.COMMENT_ID, C.PLAYLIST_ID, C.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, C.CONTENT, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT, C.DELETED_AT FROM COMMENTS C JOIN PLAYLISTS P ON P.PLAYLIST_ID = C.PLAYLIST_ID JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE C.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND C.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL FOR UPDATE

SELECT C.COMMENT_ID, C.PLAYLIST_ID, C.USER_ID, U.NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, C.CONTENT, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT, C.DELETED_AT FROM COMMENTS C JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE C.PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND C.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT ASC, C.COMMENT_ID ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENTS SET CONTENT = #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE COMMENTS SET DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
